body: #1220 is timing out for the mpi restart job, and it's not fully clear where. This PR adds a `@time` around allocating the cache.
title: Time cache allocation

body: This PR attempts to fix the longrun remapping, cc @szy21
title: Try to fix longrun remapping

body: This PR adds a hyperdiffusion type into the atmos model, and removes some global variables (`hyperdiff` and `disable_qt_hyperdiffusion`) from scope
title: Add hyperdiffusion types
